name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Real Shot M83456] This Zippy wallet is crafted from Monogram jacquard fabric, featuring a tweed-like appearance and texture. Natural leather trim complements this design. The rich color palette and minimalist shape are a perfect match, with a wrap-around zipper design that gathers many practical elements. 10 x 20 x 2 cm
